headline: 38 contracts catalogued on Ethereum mainnet across Core, Rewards, Burners, Hooks, Periphery, Hints, and legacy DefaultCollateral systems; no admin/owner EOA or multisig surfaced from on-chain reads this run.

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search returned confirmed labels for OperatorRegistry (0xad817a6b), NetworkOptInService (0x7133415b), DefaultCollateralFactory (0x1BC8FCFb), DefaultCollateralMigrator (0x8f152fea), NetworkRestakeRedistributeHook (0x8A76a3b7), and DC_wstETH (0xC3294004). All are consistent with the docs canonical addresses.

Official deployments doc fetched at https://docs.symbiotic.fi/llms-full.txt (rendered from https://docs.symbiotic.fi/get-started/resources/addresses). Lists 9 Core contracts, 3 Rewards contracts, 7 Burner contracts, 4 Hook contracts, 1 Periphery contract, 5 Hints contracts, and 19 legacy DefaultCollateral tokens—all on Ethereum mainnet. protocol_metadata.deployed_contracts_doc set to https://docs.symbiotic.fi/get-started/resources/addresses.

Audit links enumerated from the security page in the docs (llms-full.txt) and the pinned audit_links: audits by Statemind (DefaultCollateral 04-2024), ChainSecurity (DefaultCollateral 05-2024), Zellic (Core 07-2024), Statemind (Core+Rewards 06-2024–12-2024), ChainSecurity (Core 08-2024), OtterSec (Core+Rewards 09-2024), Certora (Core 09-2024), Cantina contest (Core 09-2024), ChainSecurity (Rewards V1 08-2024), Statemind (Hooks 08-2024), ChainSecurity (Burners 08-2024), ChainSecurity (Periphery 08-2024). No new in-scope addresses beyond what D2 captured; audit-era addresses are the same as current canonical addresses.

GitHub org symbioticfi confirmed via search: repos core, collateral, periphery, rewards, rewards-v2, burners, hooks, relay-contracts, network. Core contracts pinned to commit 3b6add23921d89dc364458b94e1c35bfb6736e27 in Addresses page source links. No Foundry broadcast run-latest.json or hardhat-deploy artifacts were directly fetched this run; canonical addresses come from the docs Addresses page which references these same commit SHAs.
protocol.chains is Ethereum only. No multi-chain enumeration required. D5 not applicable.

VaultFactory (0xAEb6bdd9) and DelegatorFactory (0x985Ed57A) and SlasherFactory (0x685c2eD7) are factory addresses. Individual vault/delegator/slasher instances are permissionlessly deployed by users and number in the thousands; factory child enumeration would exceed 50-entry cap. Recording factory addresses; downstream slices should enumerate via allEntities() on each factory. Cap notice: vault universe not enumerated.

Role taxonomy applied: Core registry and service contracts classified as 'factory' or 'other'; DefaultCollateral tokens as 'token'; Burners as 'other'; Hints contracts as 'other'; Hooks as 'other'. No owner/admin/multisig/timelock addresses surfaced from on-chain reads this run—defipunkd.com API was not accessible.

All addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to fetched URL https://docs.symbiotic.fi/llms-full.txt (the canonical addresses page rendered in llms format). Etherscan search results confirmed name tags for a subset. No snippet-only sightings promoted.

rationale.verdict: Walked official docs Addresses page (via llms-full.txt), GitHub org search, Etherscan name-tag search, and audit listing. 38 contracts catalogued on Ethereum mainnet with address-level citations. Admin/owner on-chain reads could not be performed (defipunkd.com API blocked this run); owner roles and upgradeability remain unverified pending next run. grade=unknown because no on-chain reads of owner/admin state were completed.

evidence.shows: Symbiotic protocol website confirms docs at docs.symbiotic.fi and GitHub at github.com/symbioticfi; links to audit page at docs.symbiotic.fi/get-started/resources/audits

Official Symbiotic full documentation including canonical Addresses page listing all mainnet deployed contract addresses for Core (VaultFactory, DelegatorFactory, SlasherFactory, NetworkRegistry, NetworkMiddlewareService, OperatorRegistry, OperatorVaultOptInService, OperatorNetworkOptInService, VaultConfigurator), Rewards (CuratorRegistry, FeeRegistry, Rewards), Burners (BurnerRouterFactory + 6 asset burners), Hooks (4 hook contracts), Periphery (DefaultCollateralMigrator), Hints (5 hint contracts), and 19 legacy DefaultCollateral token contracts; also lists bug bounty at Cantina ($500k) and multiple audit reports

D7: owner() / admin roles for VaultFactory, DelegatorFactory, SlasherFactory, NetworkRegistry, NetworkMiddlewareService, OperatorRegistry, and Rewards contracts not read on-chain (defipunkd.com API access blocked this run); actor_class set to 'unknown' for all entries pending on-chain reads
D7: VaultFactory whitelisted implementation addresses (which vault implementations are approved for migration) not enumerated this run
D6-offchain: VaultFactory.allEntities() child vault addresses not enumerated (universe of permissionlessly deployed vaults exceeds 50-entry cap); factory address recorded only
D6-offchain: DelegatorFactory and SlasherFactory child addresses not enumerated for same reason

protocol_metadata.about: Symbiotic is a modular shared security protocol on Ethereum that enables networks (rollups, bridges, oracles, and other decentralized services) to source economic security from stakers via configurable vaults. Users deposit assets such as wstETH or WBTC into vaults managed by curators, who delegate stake to operators running network infrastructure; networks can then slash misbehaving operators through the vault's slasher module. Core contracts are non-upgradeable and permissionless; the Relay SDK extends the system into a cross-chain attestation layer with BLS signature aggregation.
